title: Data Classification Procedure (PDF)
content: Data Classification Procedure for Morgan State University. Establishes a structured framework for categorizing, managing, and protecting MSU data based on its sensitivity and the risks associated with unauthorized access or disclosure. Proper classification enables the implementation of appropriate security controls and safeguards, helping to prevent data breaches, loss, or misuse, and ensuring compliance with legal, regulatory, and institutional requirements. Part of MSU's Research Security Program (cybersecurity pillar). Hosted on Google Drive. Linked from the Research Security Information Technology Resources page.
